author: vikrant-akavaram
name: SDPA-Compatible 11L + 1-sqrt Cooldown
blurb: Two novel contributions: (1) SDPA fallback enabling non-Hopper GPU training (Blackwell sm_121a verified), (2) 1-sqrt warmdown schedule (-0.019 BPB vs linear on GB10). H100 validation with SDPA: 1.1445 BPB sliding (4,026 steps in 600s). With FA3, expected ~1.10 BPB. Includes extensive ablation and negative results (SSM, MoE, self-distillation).
attention_backend: F.scaled_dot_product_attention (SDPA fallback — FA3 unavailable on pod)
calibration: AR self-generated (64 seqs x 2048 tokens, temp=0.8, no external data)
technique_summary: SDPA fallback + 1-sqrt warmdown + 11L XSA-all BigramHash3072 GPTQ-int6 LZMA9
novel_contributions: Extensive hyperparameter ablation (QK-Gain, WD, batch warmup, PTQ)
Negative results: SSM hybrid, MoE, self-distillation
